name: toolbench
description: Self-hosted all-in-one utility dashboard — single command to run both server and client

scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.start: npx concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm start --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
